notes: Uses checked-in component-scoped 9709.p2.* topic paths from the P2/P4 runtime seed extension.
No P2 row is silently remapped to P3; P2/P3 subset remains a boundary overlay.

This sidecar authorizes authority preflight only; DB write-back/search/release still require separate explicit execution.
